narrative:
Edison Village (precinct in Morrow County) has 277 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.4 percentage points.
